application.component: { "keyToString": { "FileTemplates.SelectedTemplate": "HTML File", "InstalledPluginsSearchHistory": "json", "KEYMAP": "selected", "LAST_EXTRACTOR_SCRIPTS_CLEANUP_VERSION/data/aggregators": "GO-243.26053.20", "MarketplacePluginsSearchHistory": "json\nui", "NextRunPlatformUpdateBuild": "GO-251.23774.430", "NextRunPlatformUpdateSelfBuild": "GO-243.26053.20", "NextRunPlatformUpdateVersion": "2025.1", "PluginConfigurable.selectionTab": "1", "SingleInspectionProfilePanel.VERTICAL_DIVIDER_PROPORTION": "0.39285713", "ask.about.ctrl.y.shortcut.v2": "true", "evlsprt3.243": "6", "experimental.ui.on.first.startup": "true", "experimental.ui.used.version": "243.26053.20", "fileTypeChangedCounter": "2", "fontSizeToResetConsole": "14.0", "fontSizeToResetEditor": "14.0", "migrated.non.roamable.values.from.general.settings": "true", "previousColorScheme": "_@user_Dusk", "registry.to.advanced.settings.migration.build": "GO-243.26053.20", "settings.code.style.selected.tab.HTML": "Code Generation", "settings.code.style.selected.tab.JSON": "Wrapping and Braces", "settings.code.style.selected.tab.go": "Other", "settings.code.style.selected.tab.yaml": "Wrapping and Braces" }, "keyToStringList": { "fileTypeDetectors": [ "com.intellij.ide.scratch.ScratchFileServiceImpl$Detector", "com.goide.execution.testing.frameworks.gofuzz.corpus.GoFuzzCorpusFileTypeDetector" ] } }
